stream_name: PATCH — deep_brenus grouper modules (aacr_tracker, sl_maps, access_packs)

audit_method.grouper_purpose: These are governance-level umbrella entities to prevent dangling cross_refs; they don't add new content, they add graph structure.

entities.name: Module — AACR tracker
entities.what_it_solves: Group entity for the AACR 2026 lead-tracker family: session navigation, GTM bridge, faceted filtering, schema-A master JSON, and lead audit tracker CSV.
entities.how_it_solves: Declared as a grouper so per-file entities in the AACR family can cross-reference a single owner.
entities.why_it_exists: Prevents 19 dangling cross_refs across v2 brenus stream; makes 'the AACR tracker' addressable as one entity.

member_families: csv:CrisPRO - AACR 2026 Lead Audit Tracker - Sheet1.csv

source_receipts.note: grouper — not backed by a single file

entities.name: Module — SL countermeasure maps
entities.what_it_solves: Group entity for the SL countermeasure map family: sl_countermeasure_map.csv + sl_map_summary.md and any successor variants.
entities.why_it_exists: Prevents dangling cross_refs and makes the SL-map family addressable in one entity.

source_receipts.note: grouper — not backed by a single file

entities.name: Module — access packs
entities.what_it_solves: Group entity for the dataset access-request packs: dbGaP phs003428 (application draft, blocker table, DAR checklist, dependency graph, email, missing fields, public metadata, variable dictionary) and the GBM/CRC/GEO/GLASS equivalents.
entities.why_it_exists: Access packs are recurring operational assets; one grouper keeps them findable and closes 12 dangling cross_refs from the deep audit.

source_receipts.note: grouper — not backed by a single file
